## XEmit() function

Emits the provided event whenever the decorated property changes.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function XEmit<Event extends XEvent>(xEvent: Event, { immediate, deep }?: WatchOptions): DecoratorFor<XEventPayload<Event> | undefined>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  xEvent | Event | The event to emit. |
|  { immediate, deep } | WatchOptions |  |

<b>Returns:</b>

[DecoratorFor](./x-components.decoratorfor.md)<!-- -->&lt;[XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt; \| undefined&gt;

Decorator that makes the component emit an event when the decorated property changes.
